title: johrenia alpina
intro: Johrenia alpina, also known as Alpina plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the Alpina plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the relief of digestive problems. Johrenia alpina can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
